description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C++ that runs on pull requests, pushes to main, and workflow dispatches. The workflow has three jobs: test, benchmark, and clang-format. The test job runs on a matrix of operating systems and build modes, checking out the code, setting up C++, and running unit tests. The benchmark job runs on a matrix of operating systems, checking out the code, setting up C++, building and running a benchmark. The clang-format job runs on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, and running clang-format on a specific directory.
